Urartu fortress of Erebuni clings to volcanic stone ridge, massive basalt walls disappearing into swirling snow. Bronze-fitted gates frost-locked. Guards in felt cloaks scan grey highlands. Breath freezes. Ararat's peak vanishes in winter storm.

Ziggurats of Ur wear rare snow like powdered limestone. Frost glitters on glazed blue bricks. Temple priests hurry through cold corridors, breath visible, woolen robes wrapped tight. Winter silence over mud-brick city.

Gobekli Tepe's T-pillars stand grey against Anatolian dawn, frost coating carved vultures and foxes. Cold wind cuts across hilltop sanctuary. Stone circles half-visible in ground mist. No trees, only frozen grass and distant mountains.

Hittite Hattusa's lion gates wear ice beards, massive stones dark against winter sky. Snow drifts in lower city streets. Smoke rises from royal citadel. Mountain wind howls through empty ceremonial plaza.

Highland caravan shelter carved into rock face, pack donkeys huddled inside. Bronze trade goods stacked on felt. Frozen stream below reflects pale sky. Narrow path continues upward through snow-dusted pass toward distant peaks.

Catalhoyuk rooftops under thin snow, ladder-holes breathing cedar smoke into cold morning. Starlight fades over flat-roofed houses. Ice crystals on mud-brick walls. Village silent except for wind across Anatolian plateau.

Phoenician harbor at Byblos, dawn ice forming between moored cedar ships. Frost coats hemp rigging and bronze fittings. Still water reflects grey sky. Sailors' breath fogs as they break shore ice with oars.

Stonehenge standing stones wear morning frost, lintels pale against winter clouds. Frozen grass crunches underfoot. Heel stone casts long shadow. Salisbury plain endless and white, bitter wind from the north.

Scythian felt yurt camp above treeline, bronze weapons stacked outside. Central hearth smoke rises straight in thin mountain air. Horses stamped in snow. Stars brilliant overhead. Highland silence broken only by wind.

Assyrian army crosses frozen Tigris, chariots and infantry dark against white ice. Breath-fog rises from thousands. Distant fortress walls on opposite bank. Cold sun reflects off bronze scale armor and iron spearheads.

Mountain shrine to Hurrian storm god, stone altar smoking with juniper offerings. Thin air, panoramic view of snow-peaks. Priest in wool robes, hands numb. Prayer flags whipping in high-altitude wind. Silence and cold.

Carnac stone rows in Breton winter, grey megaliths disappearing into coastal fog. Morning ice coating granite surfaces. Frozen ground between alignments. Distant sound of cold Atlantic. Ancient stones patient, eternal, frost-blessed.

Urartu citadel of Tushpa rises from Lake Van's frozen shore, basalt ramparts black against snow-laden clouds. Ice extends from stone docks. Wool-cloaked sentries pace battlements. Bronze braziers glow orange. Mountain wind cuts across fortress courtyards.

Babylon's Ishtar Gate under unprecedented frost, glazed dragons and bulls glittering with ice. Temple priests burn extra cedar against cold penetrating mud-brick walls. Euphrates flows grey and slow. Winter silence muffles processional street.

Kassite border fort in Zagros highlands, stone watchtower half-buried in snowdrift. Garrison huddled around hearth, bronze weapons leaning against cold walls. Mountain pass beyond buried. No caravans today. Only wind and waiting.

Dilmun trading post on Bahrain island, rare cold dawn with frost coating date palms and limestone walls. Moored reed boats frozen to quayside. Merchants in doubled wool robes negotiate beside smoking braziers. Breath visible.

Olmec highland camp in Veracruz mountains, basalt head half-carved, stone tools abandoned in sudden cold rain. Shelter-builders huddle beneath palm-thatch. Mist rises from valley below. Jade pendants cold against skin. Fire struggles against wind.

Mycenaean merchant ship wintering in Cretan harbor, ice forming around hull. Sailors repair wool sails inside stone warehouse, fingers stiff. Bronze cargo secured beneath felt covers. Grey Aegean beyond breakwater. Waiting for spring.

Shang dynasty mountain copper mine, workers descending frozen shaft with bronze tools and hemp rope. Breath-fog thick. Stone sledges waiting for ore. Highland pines bent with ice. Distant drumbeat from valley fortress marks hours.

Nuraghe tower in Sardinian highlands under rare snow, cyclopean stones white-capped. Smoke leaking from corbelled interior. Wool-wrapped shepherds drive flocks to lower pastures. Bronze warrior statue at entrance wears frost crown. Mountain silence.

Chavin de Huantar temple plaza, Andean altitude freezing morning dew on stone jaguar faces. Priests process through cold galleries, llama-wool robes trailing. Thin air makes torches flicker. Distant peaks reflect first light above coastal fog.

Elam winter palace at Susa foothills, glazed brick reception hall empty and cold. Servants carry charcoal braziers through corridors. Frost patterns on colored tiles. Mountains beyond courtyard buried in grey clouds. King stays south until thaw.

Armenian obsidian quarry site, workers chipping black glass with cold-numbed hands. Snow patches between extraction pits. Bronze-tipped picks stacked beside felt windbreak. Pack animals waiting, breath steaming. Volcanic ridge vanishes into low clouds above.

Proto-Celtic hillfort in Alpine foothills, timber palisade dark against morning snow. Smoke from longhouses rises through ice-coated thatch. Bronze shields stacked inside gate. Frozen streambed winds toward valley. Sentries stamp feet, watching pass below.

Minoan mountain sanctuary on Cretan peak, stone altar slick with ice, bronze double-axes frost-white. Priestess ascends through cloud layer, wool cloak heavy with moisture. Thin air, ritual smoke dissolving instantly. Snow-capped summit overlooks winter Mediterranean far below.
